animation.init: Starting Quick Sort with array length {{length}}
animation.call: Recursive partitioning: processing range [{{low}}, {{high}}], entering depth {{depth}}
animation.partition_start: Selected the last element {{pivotVal}} as the Pivot
animation.compare: Comparing: Is {{scanVal}} less than or equal to pivot {{pivotVal}}?
animation.pivot_set: Partitioning complete, placing pivot {{pivotVal}} at its correct sorted position (Index {{pivotIdx}})
animation.base_case: Range has only one element {{value}}, marking it directly as sorted
animation.done: Quick Sort complete! All elements are now in their correct positions.
